# Version 4.151.0 (Unreleased)
> **Engine sync and leak fix**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 syncs upstream Skia m151 bug fixes and patches a native resource leak.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Upstream Skia m151 bug fixes merged** — Cherry-picked bug fixes from the Chrome/m151 Skia branch keep the bundled engine current with upstream stability improvements. ([#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) was leaking a native handle; the extra reference is now released correctly. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
